description: Use this API to modify the data of an existing non-conventional source fault contribution table in the working case or to add a new non-conventional source fault contribution table to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.2.0. ierr = seq_ncs_table_data(name, points, typarg, realar, cplxar)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_ncs_table_data(name, points, typarg, realar, cplxar)

parameters.name: points
parameters.description: Number of points specified in table ‘name’ (1 through 20). (input).

parameters.name: typarg
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying characteristic type; 1 for time dependent, 2 for voltage dependent. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of POINTS elements specifying array of ‘POINTS’ values specifying Ti in seconds or Vi in per unit, in strictly ascending order of Ti or Vi. (input).

parameters.name: cplxar
parameters.description: An array of POINTS elements specifying array of ‘POINTS’ values specifying CiP and CiQ . (input).

error_codes.description: table does not have at least 1 point.
maximum number of tables are already in the case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid characteristic type flag - point is beyond the previous end of table - Ti or Vi is negative - Ci is (0.0,0.0) - Ti or Vi values are not in increasing order.
